name: Oreo Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease/flour a 9-inch tube pan.
3. Cut each sandwich cookie into quarters and reserve.
4. In a large bowl, beat flour and remaining ingredients except Chocolate Glaze until blended.
5. Increase speed to high and beat for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Spoon about 3/4 cup batter into the prepared pan.
7. Gently stir in the cut-up cookies into the remaining batter and spoon into the same pan. (I like to gently push about three to seven whole cookies into the batter so kids get the extra surprise of finding them!)
8. Bake for 50 minutes or until the cake springs back when tapped with a finger.
9. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack for ten minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
